era_context: Late Bronze Age aftermath; Iron Age consolidation. Egypt (Ramesses XI, 20th Dynasty); Zhou Dynasty (Western Zhou). Broader context: recovery from Bronze Age collapse, emergence of alphabetic writing, consolidation of territorial states.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed (no events listed for this year).
historiographic_note: 1058 BCE is archaeologically and epigraphically undocumented. No specific events are attested for this year. The historical record for this period is sparse and concentrated in Egypt and China; most of the world's population and civilizations leave no written trace for this era.
